highlight.title: The Science of Psychological Safety - Amy Edmondson Research Update
highlight.summary: Harvard's Amy Edmondson continues to validate psychological safety as the #1 factor in team effectiveness through new research showing its critical role in AI adoption and hybrid work environments. <cite index="3-6,3-15">Teams today move too fast for fear-based cultures to survive, and 2026 is the year it becomes a performance requirement.</cite>

resources.title: Leadership Trends That Will Dominate in 2026
resources.why_now: <cite index="1-24,1-25">As AI handles more technical tasks, human-centered leadership becomes essential, with leaders needing to create environments that foster unique perspectives, creativity and emotional intelligence.</cite>

resources.title: 7 Proven Leadership Team Coaching Frameworks That Actually Work
resources.why_now: <cite index="24-6">Data shows that 60-70% of leadership development impact dissipates within six months without sustained reinforcement</cite>, making structured coaching frameworks essential for 2026.

resources.title: Leadership Trends for 2026: What Should Leaders Prepare For?
resources.why_now: <cite index="9-25,9-32">As AI handles more execution and analysis, the value of leadership moves decisively upstream into judgment, with strategy becoming a continuous learning system rather than an annual artifact.</cite>

resources.title: Ethical Risk Factors in AI Decision Making
resources.why_now: <cite index="32-1,32-23">Research shows technological uncertainty and incomplete data are main sources of ethical risks in AI decision making, requiring leaders to strengthen risk governance and management norms.</cite>

claude_take: The convergence of AI capabilities and leadership demands is creating an inflection point where traditional management approaches simply don't scale. Leaders who master the paradox of leveraging AI while deepening human connection—through psychological safety, coaching mindsets, and ethical decision-making frameworks—will define organizational success in 2026.
